message:
fix: useMetricsHistory tests, watchdog comments, localStorage guards (#5818)

- Fix useMetricsHistory tests for 5s initial delay and Date.now guard (#5811)
- Update watchdog comments to document degraded status acceptance (#5815)
- Wrap StockMarketTicker localStorage read in try/catch (#5812)
- Add typeof window guard to UpgradeStatus module-level IIFE (#5814)

Fixes #5811 #5812 #5814 #5815

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
